title: Find My Device - Device list with more then 4 devices
scenario: Find My Device list becomes scrollable with fade indicator when more than 4 headsets are paired
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Pair more than 4 Poly Bluetooth headsets (e.g., 5 or more) to the device
Ensure some headsets are connected and some are disconnected
Navigate to the Find My Device feature on the Home screen
Tap to expand the Find My Device list
Scroll through the list of paired headsets
expected: The Find My Device list expands to show all paired headsets (connected and disconnected). The list is scrollable, and a slight fade effect appears at the bottom of the list to indicate that more items are available to scroll to.
